title: PPL Corporation's (PPL) Q4 Earnings In Line, Revenues Beat Estimates
text: PPL Corporation???s (PPL) fourth-quarter earnings are on par with estimates, while revenues surpass the same.

title: PPL Corporation (PPL) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 17, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Andy Ludwig - Vice President, Investor Relations Vince Sorgi - President & Chief Executive Officer Joe Bergstein - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI Paul Patterson - Glenrock Associates Angie Storozynski - Seaport David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Greg Orrill - UBS Paul Zimbardo - Bank of America Neil Kalton - Wells Fargo Operator Good morning and welcome to the PPL Corporation Fourth Quarter and Year-end 2022 Financial Results Conference Call. All participants will be in listen-only mode.

title: PPL (PPL) Matches Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: PPL (PPL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 44.27%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: PPL Corporation: Still Not Electrified After A Reasonable 2022
text: PPL Corporation has made some transformative moves in 2021. Moving out of the UK and buying a U.S. asset has addressed leverage in part.

title: PPL Corporation (PPL) to Report Q4 Earnings: What to Expect?
text: PPL Corporation (PPL) fourth-quarter earnings are likely to have benefited from ongoing capital investments and completed acquisition.
